title: Zakiyyah Mcclure
compiled_truth: Zakiyyah Mcclure is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-20 to 2002-06-21), Zakiyyah Mcclure sent 22 and received 58 emails, totalling 80 interactions.
